name: rust-browser-control
description: Control the visible Codex in-app browser on Linux through a local Rust MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Share the visible Codex browser and cursor on Linux.
interface.longDescription: Control the current task's visible in-app browser through Codex's browser-use socket. Supports shared cursor movement, clicks, scrolling, navigation, compact DOM snapshots, typing, screenshots, and verified downloads without launching a separate browser profile.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Rust Browser Control to operate this task's visible side-pane browser safely.
